title: PPIP -  Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Share Data
scenario: "Share Data" toggle in App Settings > General > Account is ON after tapping "Share Data" on PPIP dialog during onboarding
steps: 1. Complete the onboarding flow in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the PPIP (Privacy Policy & Information Prompt) dialog, observe the message "Help us improve your experience."
3. Tap the "Share Data" button on the PPIP dialog.
4. If on iOS, handle the location permission prompt that appears.
5. Observe that the PPIP dialog closes and the Home screen is displayed.
6. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
expected: The "Share Data" toggle in App Settings > General > Account is shown as ON, with a description explaining that basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) is shared, excluding personal information.
